docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 15201110) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIME ASCOT LP DBA BLE ROCK VILLAGE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIME ASCOT LP DBA BLE ROCK VILLAGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEYMORE, LAMAR $1,623.45 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $221.32 INTEREST, $274.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,543.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15201110)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LAMAR SEYMORE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.
